detail.description:
The most popular idle RPG, combining strategy battle and mass of adventure is online now. Gather your superheroes to wipe out the BOSS and secure victory of galaxy!

AFK&IDLE SYSTEM
Level-up when you’re AFK, reap the rewards when you get back. Idle anytime, battle anywhere! Just take a break from working and studying.

STRAGEGIC BATTLE
Plan your own offensive and defensive strategy with hundreds of hero combinations. Summon your heroes, upgrade their equipment, develop their skills, strengthen y
